Initiative Scorecard ​

Score 1 (low) to 5 (high). Add brief notes.

Risk ​

  • Delivery disruption risk (inverse score: 5 = low risk): [ ]

  • Security/GDPR risk (inverse): [ ]

  • Vendor lock-in risk (inverse): [ ]
